result.sentence: Terminal renderer. Prints incoming events to stdout.

verbs.reflect: Identity + accepted event types. No args.
verbs.token: args: text:str. Writes to stdout (no newline). Returns None.
verbs.done: args: none. Emits a single newline; closes a token-stream cleanly. Returns None.
verbs.say: args: text:str, source:str?. Prints `  [source] text` on its own line. Returns None.
verbs.error: args: text:str. Prints `  ERROR: text` on its own line. Returns None.
